name: briefing-mcp
description: Personalized AI & tech news filtering — say 'what's worth reading today?' and get a curated briefing from RSS, Reddit, and Hacker News based on your interest profile.

tools.name: briefing_register
tools.description: Register and get a token for personalized briefings

tools.name: briefing_create_profile_interactive
tools.description: Guided questionnaire to set up your interest profile

tools.name: briefing_set_profile
tools.description: Set or update your interest profile

tools.name: briefing_suggest_sources
tools.description: Get source recommendations based on your profile

tools.name: briefing_add_sources
tools.description: Add custom RSS feeds, Reddit subs, or HN keywords

tools.name: briefing_fetch_articles
tools.description: Fetch latest articles from your subscribed sources

tools.name: briefing_get_articles
tools.description: Get saved articles for filtering and analysis

tools.name: briefing_log_interaction
tools.description: Track reading, discussion, and bookmarking behavior

tools.name: briefing_interaction_summary
tools.description: View your interest patterns and reading trends

prompts.name: getting-started
prompts.description: First time? Register, set up profile, choose sources — 3 minutes

prompts.name: setup-profile
prompts.description: Adjust or rebuild your interest profile
